title: Premium High-Fashion Editorial Poster
sourceTitle: Korean Streetwear High Fashion Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium high-fashion editorial poster for LUXURY, built in a luxury Korean streetwear magazine style with oversized background typography LUXURY. Subject: adult male fashion model with calm expression and relaxed confident stance stands centered symmetrically with neutral expression, hands in pockets, and relaxed confident posture while wearing oversized monochrome Korean streetwear with baggy cargo pants, layered hoodie, puffer bomber jacket, and high-end sneakers. Scene: Minimal futuristic editorial studio with clean negative space, monochromatic streetwear atmosphere, and luxury magazine campaign restraint. Composition: Fixed full-body vertical poster: centered model, symmetrical stance, oversized bold typography dominating the background, clean margins, and strong fashion-magazine hierarchy. Signature Elements: Full-body male streetwear model, baggy cargos, layered hoodie, puffer or bomber jacket, high-end sneakers, symmetrical stance, oversized typography, and minimal futuristic magazine layout. Style: Luxury Korean streetwear magazine aesthetic, premium editorial fashion photography, minimal futuristic art direction, refined monochromatic styling, high-end sneakers, and polished campaign finish. Color Palette: Fixed monochromatic luxury palette with black, charcoal, off-white, muted greys, and restrained tonal highlights. Lighting: Soft controlled editorial lighting with clean face readability, subtle jacket and sneaker highlights, gentle studio shadows, and high-end magazine depth. Typography: LUXURY appears as oversized bold background type; LUXURY appears as the refined campaign brand mark without cluttering the model. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
